hero.title: Every place should be open to everyone
hero.subtitle: OpenPlaces is the collaborative map for discovering eco-friendly, accessible businesses that care about every dietary need. Found, reviewed and suggested by the community.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: Finding a wheelchair-accessible restaurant, an allergy-aware café or a truly sustainable shop shouldn't be a treasure hunt. OpenPlaces exists to make visible the places that care about people and the planet — told and rated by those who experience them every day, not by ads.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Find eco-friendly activities near you: restaurants, shops, markets and more.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See what the community thinks about sustainability, accessibility and dietary options.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Sign up to leave reviews or list your business if you run one.

newsletter.title: Stay updated
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive updates on new eco-friendly activities in your area.
newsletter.privacy: We only use your email to send you OpenPlaces updates. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter.cancel: To unsubscribe at any time, email privacy@OpenPlaces.it or use the Unsubscribe button above.

cta.title: Join OpenPlaces
cta.subtitle: Are you a curious user or do you run an eco-friendly business? Sign up and become part of the community.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Join the OpenPlaces community
register.subtitleOwner: Create an owner account to manage your business on OpenPlaces
register.name: Name
register.newsletterDesc: Get updates on new eco-friendly activities. No spam — unsubscribe anytime from your profile.
register.terms: By signing up you agree to our terms of service. Your data will not be shared with third parties.

activity.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to review!

profile.title: My profile
profile.name: Name
profile.newsletterSubscribed: You are currently subscribed to the newsletter.
profile.newsletterNotSubscribed: You are not subscribed to the newsletter.
profile.noReviews: You haven't left any reviews yet.

about.title: About us
about.p1: OpenPlaces was born from the belief that every daily choice can make a difference. We are a community of people who believe in sustainability, accessibility and transparency — and we want to make it easier to find local businesses that share these values.
about.p2: Whether you're looking for a restaurant with vegan options, a zero-waste shop or an eco-friendly accommodation, OpenPlaces helps you discover them through real community reviews — no greenwashing, just verified experiences from those who live them every day.
about.p3: If you run a business and want to be part of it, sign up and suggest it on OpenPlaces. If you're a curious user, explore the map and leave your reviews — every contribution helps the community grow.

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.intro: OpenPlaces uses essential technical cookies for the website to function. We do not use profiling or tracking cookies for advertising purposes.
cookie.techText: We use an httpOnly cookie for user session management (refresh token). This cookie is not accessible from JavaScript and is required to keep authentication active securely. It is automatically deleted on logout or after 7 days.
cookie.thirdText: Maps are provided by OpenStreetMap via Leaflet. OpenStreetMap may set its own cookies — check their privacy policy for more information.
cookie.manageText: You can disable cookies in your browser, but some site features (such as session persistence) may not work correctly.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

footer.tagline: The collaborative map of places open to everyone: eco-friendly, accessible and mindful of everyone's needs.

chatbot.title: OpenPlaces Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Powered by AI
chatbot.welcome: Hi! How can I help you find eco-friendly activities?
chatbot.hint: Looking for a place? Ask me! 👋
chatbot.error: Error in response. Please try again.

addActivity.title: Suggest a new activity
addActivity.subtitle: Know an eco-friendly business that's not on OpenPlaces yet? Add it! It will be visible after our team's approval.
addActivity.name: Activity name
addActivity.notFound: Address not found. Try being more specific or move the marker manually.
addActivity.dragHint: Drag the marker to adjust the position
addActivity.success: Activity suggested successfully! It will be visible after approval.
addActivity.error: Error during submission. Please try again.
addActivity.missingCoordinates: Before submitting, find the location on the map.
